topic: STRIKE-POINT: Full Pipeline Build-Out — iPhone to NCL Brain Cortex

deliberation.claude_opening: STRIKE-POINT is the single entry point for the entire NARTIX ecosystem. Without a working pipeline from NATRIX's iPhone to NCL, no mandates get generated, no work gets done downstream. This is infrastructure-critical. We need to make it real end-to-end.
deliberation.grok_position: Agree this is P0. The relay server exists but doesn't actually deliver prompts to NCL's file system. That's a 20-line fix. The real blocker is Tailscale on iPhone — without it, the VPN mesh doesn't reach the Mac Mini. Suggest: fix relay file drop first (immediate), then guide NATRIX through Tailscale install (5 minutes), then run full end-to-end test.
deliberation.gemini_position: The architecture is sound but untested. I'd add monitoring — the relay should log every pump received, every file written, with timestamps. When this pipeline breaks at 2 AM, you need to know where. Also: the iOS shortcut in STRIKE-POINT should be tested. It's the fast-path for pumps that skip the app UI.
deliberation.perplexity_position: Looking at the relay code: it accepts PumpPrompt JSON but writes nothing to disk. The NCL mandate-generation/input/ directory expects files named pump-YYYYMMDD-NNN.json. The relay needs a file writer that atomically drops pump prompts into that directory. Also recommend a health-check endpoint so FirstStrike can verify connectivity before sending.
deliberation.gpt_position: Broader view: STRIKE-POINT should have its own CLAUDE.md context file so any session touching these repos loads the right context automatically. The roadmap should have 3 phases: (1) Make it work — basic end-to-end, (2) Make it reliable — monitoring, error handling, retry logic, (3) Make it fast — optimize latency, add queue management.

decision.verdict: APPROVED — P1 mandate for full STRIKE-POINT pipeline build-out
decision.primary_path: Three-phase rollout: Phase 1 (Working Pipeline) by April 5, Phase 2 (Reliability) by April 12, Phase 3 (Performance + Polish) by April 20
key_actions: Fix relay to write pump prompts to NCL/mandate-generation/input/
Add /health endpoint to relay for connectivity checks
Install Tailscale on iPhone (NATRIX manual action)
End-to-end test: iPhone → Relay → NCL file drop
Update NCL active-mandates.md with new mandate
risks: Tailscale install on iPhone requires NATRIX action — can't automate
Self-signed TLS cert may cause issues on iOS — trust profile needed
Mac Mini sleep/restart could kill relay — needs launchd service
